name: TitleMax Title Pawns
description_short: At 10475 Alpharetta St in Roswell, GA, TitleMax Title Pawns provides quick title and payday loans with fast funding.
description_long:
TitleMax Title Pawns is located at 10475 Alpharetta St in Roswell, GA, serving the local community with accessible business hours. Monday through Friday, the location is open 10 AM to 7 PM, with Saturday hours from 10 AM to 4 PM. The storefront is closed on Sundays.

At this Roswell location, you can apply for title loans or payday loans with quick approval and flexible terms. The staff helps guide you through your options and application process. For specific questions or to learn more, contact the branch at +1 678-352-7738.

When you need emergency cash, bring a valid ID and proof of income to the location on Alpharetta St. TitleMax Title Pawns in Roswell, GA specializes in fast title and payday loans designed to help residents address financial emergencies.
pros: Same-day cash funding available upon approval and store visit
Online application with vehicle photo appraisal—can apply from home using cell phone
Accepts most credit types, not limited to prime borrowers
Quick approval process with instant eligibility determination online
Borrowers can continue driving their vehicle during the pawn period
Competitive rates compared to other title lenders
Established local presence since July 2004 with 465+ five-star Google reviews
cons: No APR, fees, or specific repayment term details disclosed on website
Risk of vehicle loss if loan is not repaid on time
Bilingual services not available at Candler Road location despite serving diverse Atlanta area
Title pawns are high-cost emergency lending, not sustainable long-term debt solutions
Requires clear vehicle title and government ID—excludes those without these documents
best_for: Atlanta-area residents needing immediate cash with vehicle collateral and fair-to-poor credit
Vehicle owners facing urgent expenses who want to retain driving access during the loan
Borrowers who have been denied traditional personal loans or credit products
Individuals with existing vehicle equity seeking quick approval without extensive underwriting
diagnosis: TitleMax is best for Atlanta-area residents with vehicle equity who need immediate cash and have fair-to-poor credit profiles that limit traditional lending options. The critical caveat is that title pawns carry significant risk—vehicle loss upon non-repayment—and the website does not disclose APR or fee structures, making it difficult to assess true cost before applying.
services: Online vehicle appraisal via photo submission
Online title pawn application and pre-approval
Customer account management portals (separate for title pawns vs. personal loans)
meta_description: TitleMax Title Pawns at 10475 Alpharetta St, Roswell, GA. Fast title and payday loans with same-day funding.
